falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 80% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low formation; a break below 4,800 would violate that structural bottom and invalidate the bullish reversal thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained volatility spike contradicts the 'HOLD' signal's embedded assumption of complacent/stable regime; blowoff score of 41 suggests controlled conditions, and VIX >25 x3 days proves regime shift to stress

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further to -50bps or wider (more negative)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion would signal accelerating recession risk that overrides the pattern's cyclical bottoming narrative; the aug_2024 bottom occurred during disinversion, so re-inversion to -50bps falsifies the parallel

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
